dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The city of Astra. A beacon of hope, they say. A testament to human resilience, protected by those with extraordinary gifts.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But even beacons cast long shadows. And in those shadows, the truth often hides.

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: Another day, another parade. Another hero basking in the manufactured adoration of the masses.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WIND WHISTLES

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: Captain Justice. The 'Invincible Shield of Astra.' More like the 'Invincible Ego.'

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CROWD CHEERS (DISTANT)

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: He saves a cat from a tree, ignores the corporate fraud that bleeds the city dry. He stops a bank robbery, while his 'charity' funnels millions into offshore accounts.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK. WHIRR.

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: My ocular implant zooms in. His smile is too wide, too practiced. The crowd roars. Sheep.

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: They see the cape, the muscles, the 'hero.' I see the cracks in the facade. The vulnerabilities. The greed.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: KEYBOARD CLACKS (SOFTLY)

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: Phase One: Infiltration complete. The drone is in position, disguised as a standard news feed unit. It's broadcasting a clean signal now.

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: Soon, it will broadcast something else entirely.

dialogue.speaker: Captain Justice
dialogue.line: My fellow citizens! It is an honor, as always, to stand before you. To be your shield, your sword, your... Justice!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CROWD ERUPTS IN APPLAUSE

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: Queue the feed. Now.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BEEP. STATIC FRITZ. (ON ALL PUBLIC SCREENS)

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: The crowd murmurs. Captain Justice looks annoyed. Good.

dialogue.speaker: Captain Justice
dialogue.line: What is this? A technical glitch? Security, get this sorted!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: VIDEO PLAYS (ON SCREENS) - A grainy recording of Captain Justice accepting a briefcase full of cash from a known crime boss.

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: The murmurs turn to gasps. Then angry shouts.

dialogue.speaker: Captain Justice
dialogue.line: No! This is... this is doctored! A smear campaign! Don't believe it!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ANOTHER VIDEO PLAYS - Captain Justice laughing as a building collapses in the background, a small, non-powered civilian trapped, while he poses for a camera crew.

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: His face is pale. The 'Invincible Shield' is crumbling.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SIRENS WAIL (APPROACHING)

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: Time for my grand entrance. And his grand exit.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRAPPLE HOOK FIRES. ZING!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Zero descends from the rooftop, a dark silhouette against the setting sun, landing silently behind the now-panicked hero.

dialogue.speaker: Captain Justice
dialogue.line: Who... who are you?! This is a mistake! I'm Captain Justice!

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: Not anymore.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ZAP! (A small, focused energy pulse from Zero's gauntlet)

dialogue.speaker: Captain Justice
dialogue.line: A-ARGH! My... my powers! They're... gone!

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: Temporarily. Just long enough for the authorities to arrive. And for the public to see you for what you truly are.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD. (Captain Justice collapses)

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: Another hero falls. Another illusion shattered.

dialogue.speaker: Zero
dialogue.line: This city doesn't need saviors. It needs an exterminator.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As police swarmed the scene, Zero vanished into the shadows, leaving behind a disgraced hero and a city questioning everything it thought it knew.

summary: Zero, the Hero Killer, targets the popular but corrupt hero Captain Justice, publicly exposing his misdeeds through a hacked broadcast and then incapacitating him, leaving the city in shock.
